mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cftc_cot (record_date, commodity_code, total_open_interest, fund_long, fund_short, fund_net, commercial_long, commercial_short, reportable_traders, record_time) VALUES (#{recordDate}, #{commodityCode}, #{totalOpenInterest}, #{fundLong}, #{fundShort}, #{fundNet}, #{commercialLong}, #{commercialShort}, #{reportableTraders}, #{recordTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cftc_cot WHERE record_date = #{recordDate} AND commodity_code = #{commodityCode}
mapper.select: SELECT id, record_date AS recordDate, commodity_code AS commodityCode, total_open_interest AS totalOpenInterest, fund_long AS fundLong, fund_short AS fundShort, fund_net AS fundNet, commercial_long AS commercialLong, commercial_short AS commercialShort, reportable_traders AS reportableTraders, record_time AS recordTime FROM cftc_cot WHERE commodity_code = #{commodityCode} AND YEAR(record_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(record_date) = #{month} ORDER BY record_date DESC

SELECT id, record_date AS recordDate, commodity_code AS commodityCode, total_open_interest AS totalOpenInterest, fund_long AS fundLong, fund_short AS fundShort, fund_net AS fundNet, commercial_long AS commercialLong, commercial_short AS commercialShort, reportable_traders AS reportableTraders, record_time AS recordTime FROM cftc_cot WHERE record_date < #{recordDate} AND commodity_code = #{commodityCode} ORDER BY record_date DESC LIMIT 1
